title: 20pcs Transparent Cable Clips,Strong Self-Adhesive CableClips,Cable Clips,Self Adhesive Cable Tidy Wire Clips,Adhesive Cable Management Wall Holder Cord Organiser Clips for Home,School,Office
features: 【Contents of the package】:Self-adhesive clips, colours: transparent, cable clips, quantity: 20 pieces
【Material】: Our cable clamps are made of plastic and come with 2 strong double-sided self-adhesive pads.
【Suitable sizes】:Adhesive cable clips size is 30mmx11mmx8mm, Suitable, size fits most wires.

【Easy to install】:The Cable wall clips are installed by simply removes the paper and glues the adhesive, No need to drill, Please keep surfaces clean and dry when installing to ensure maximum adhesion.Do not use it until the glue actually sticks.

【Keeps aesthetics and tidy】:Sticky cable clips can be fixed on clean/smooth surface. Such as tables, walls, skirting boards, plastics, wood, glass, metal, etc. The transparency of the cable organiser allows it to be used in an aesthetically pleasing and unobtrusive manner.
description: Easy to Install 1. Make sure the mounting surface is clean and free from dirt, dust, grease and wax. 2. Wipe the surface with alcohol and let it dry completely. 3. Peel off the back cover of the base. 4. Stick it on the right position firmly, Stick it on and then hold it down for 10 seconds. 5. Do not put weight on them for a few minutes until the glue really sticks. 6. Start to manage your cords. Notice: Not suitable for rough surfaces such as lime walls, wallpaper, painted surfaces etc If you have moved or removed the cable clips, you can purchase a separate self-adhesive double-sided adhesive for multiple use. Wide range of use The stick on cable clips is used for your Data cables, audio cables, sheathed cables, plug-in cables, USB cables, network cables, etc. Specifications: Material: ABS plastic+ Double sided sponge adhesive Color: Transparent Size:30mmx11mmx8mm Quantity: 20pieces
